title: FMapOverlayMod
description: Shows all factions and their names visually
body:
FactionMapOverlayMod
===============

Shows all factions and their names visually around you (when the server has a faction plugin) if you run "/f map"

Config keybind: Y + C

If you have questions or need help with something, the fastest way to get answers is to join [Discord](https://discord.gg/VTHVVgt "Discord"), otherwise put them on my github incase of crashes/bugs [click here](https://github.com/vacla/FMapOverlayMod/issues "click here")

## Want to support development?
If you want to support development, check out my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Annevdl29 "Patreon")! Supporting me via Patreon lets me spend more time modding, and allows me to put out more updates for everyone to enjoy.
